mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna( userId, userName, title, contents ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{title}, #{contents} )
mapper.select: SELECT qnaSeq , userId , userName , title , contents , TO_CHAR(createdAt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createdAt , answerId FROM qna ORDER BY qnaSeq DESC LIMIT #{offset} , 10

SELECT qnaSeq , userId , userName , title , contents , TO_CHAR(createdAt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createdAt , answerId , answerName , answerContents , TO_CHAR(createdAt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS answerCreatedAt FROM qna WHERE qnaSeq = #{qnaSeq};
mapper.update: UPDATE qna SET answerId = #{answerId}, answerName = #{answerName}, answerContents = #{answerContents}, answerCreatedAt = SYSDATE() WHERE qnaSeq = #{qnaSeq}
UPDATE qna SET answerId = null, answerName = null, answerContents = null, answerCreatedAt = SYSDATE() WHERE qnaSeq = #{qnaSeq}
